## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` version stamp bumped (`**Skill version: vN.**`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added, naming the driving failure
- [ ] Call-budget impact stated (or N/A for output-format fixes)
- [ ] Tested against live/most-recent-close data on 2–3 names (before/after reads below)
- [ ] Output still phone-readable (~380px)
